fields.label: API Provider
fields.description: Select the AI provider. Anthropic (Claude) is recommended for better agentic capabilities.

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: API key for the selected provider (Anthropic or OpenAI)

fields.label: Model
fields.options:
claude-sonnet-4-20250514 (Recommended - Fast & Capable)
claude-opus-4-5-20250514 (Most Intelligent)
claude-sonnet-4-5-20250514 (Latest Sonnet)
claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022 (Previous Sonnet)
claude-3-5-haiku-20241022 (Fastest & Cheapest)
gpt-4.1 (Latest GPT-4)
gpt-4o (Fast GPT-4)
gpt-4o-mini (Budget GPT-4)
gpt-4-turbo (GPT-4 Turbo)
o3-mini (Reasoning - Fast)
o4-mini (Reasoning - Latest)
fields.description: Select the model. Max tokens will be set automatically based on model capabilities.

fields.label: Max Tokens (Context)
fields.description: Maximum tokens for conversation context. Leave empty for automatic defaults based on model. Claude models: 150K, GPT-4: 100K, GPT-4-mini: 80K

fields.label: System Instructions
fields.description: Custom instructions for the AI assistant. These will be included in every conversation. Use {user_name}, {user_email}, {user_roles}, {company}, and {current_datetime} as placeholders.

fields.label: Available Placeholders
fields.options:
Available Placeholders:
  • {user_name} - Full name of the current user
  • {user_email} - Email address of the current user
  • {user_roles} - Comma-separated list of user roles
  • {company} - Current default company
  • {current_datetime} - Current date and time

These placeholders will be automatically replaced with actual values when the AI assistant is initialized.
